sglang.title: [AMD] Reduce NSA indexer kernels (weights_proj,  k-cache store kernel fusion)
sglang.author: 1am9trash
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Redundant kernels in the NSA indexer on HIP:
weights_proj:

The ReplicatedLinear layer uses fp32 params_dtype, preventing tgemm from dispatching to the tuned bf16 fused kernel and falling back to torch GEMM instead. An additional x.to(fp32) cast is also required before the GEMM.
Total: 3

sglang.author: yctseng0211
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix multimodal-gen-test-2-gpu-amd consistently timing out on partition 0.
Root cause: The 2-gpu suite has 1 standalone file (test_disagg_server.py). The partitioning logic reserves one partition for each standalone file:
parametrized_partitions = total_partitions - len(standalone_files)

sglang.title: ci: run weekly est_time update on Monday using p90 of last 15 runs
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The Weekly Update Est Time workflow keeps the LPT load-balancing accurate by refreshing est_time in CI test registration calls from real run history. Three tweaks make it more useful:

Schedule shift: Saturday 00:00 UTC → Monday 00:00 UTC so the refresh PR lands at the start of the work w

sglang.title: Multi platform Plugin
sglang.author: Baidu-AIAK
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Introduce a unified plugin framework for SGLang, inspired by vLLM's platform abstraction, enabling hardware vendors and advanced users to extend SGLang without forking or modifying the main repository.
The framework provides two plugin types, both discovered via Python's standard setuptools

sglang.bodyExcerpt: Move SessionAwareCache and SessionController out of mem_cache/ and managers/ into a dedicated session/ package. Pure rename + import updates; no behavior change.

sglang.title: fix(ci): repair path filters regressed by #21482
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
PR #21482 ("Skip ci for .md files", merged 2026-03-28) introduced two different negation styles in the same change. It used the correct basename-level form for main_package and test:
"python/sglang/!(multimodal_gen)/**/!(*.md)"
"test/**/!(*.md)"

but used a broken extension-level form for sg

sglang.title: [CI] Partition stage-a-test-cpu into 4 matrix shards

Summary

Split stage-a-test-cpu into 4 matrix partitions to address tight wall time.
The suite has grown to ~1219s of estimated test time across 115 registered tests; the single-job run was close to the 10-min step timeout.
Uses the same LPT auto-partition mechanism already in place for stage-b-test

sglang.title: wait for reap in kill_process_tree
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Fix race between Engine.shutdown() / fixture teardown and the next GPU allocation: after SIGKILL, children still hold GPU context until the kernel reaps them. Add optional wait_timeout to kill_process_tree (warn after ~10s, raise on hard timeout), default None keeps existing behavior. Apply wait_tim

sglang.title: [AMD] Pin peft<0.19 in pyproject_other.toml to fix ROCm CI ImportError
sglang.author: bingxche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Pin peft>=0.18.0,<0.19.0 in both the diffusion_hip and test extras of python/pyproject_other.toml to unblock AMD ROCm CI.
Motivation
peft 0.19.0 (released Apr 14, 2026) bumped its required torchao floor from >=0.4.0 to >=0.16.0 inside peft.import_utils.is_torchao_available (huggingface/peft#

sglang.title: [UnifiedRadixTree] Reclaim L2 host pool slots on flush_cache
sglang.author: icepoint666
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
UnifiedRadixCache._reset_full() doesn't reclaim host KV slots held by destroyed tree nodes, so after one POST /flush_cache the host pool stays full forever and all subsequent write_backup calls silently no-op, L2 is disabled until process restart.
Modifications
Call cache_controller.reset

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Kimi-K2 tool parser streaming - fix token leakage, argument truncation, and content dropping
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Rewrites KimiK2ToolParser streaming to re-parse current_text on each streaming delta instead of tracking incremental token-ID counts. This eliminates the fragile state machine that caused multiple interrelated bugs.

Issues Addressed



Issue/PR
Bug
How this PR fixes it

vllm.title: [FEAT] [Perf] [Gemma4] Fused Gemma4 Routing Function Triton
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Improve the performance of Gemma4 by introducing triton fused routing function.
The custom routing function introduces many synchronizations point and read write to global memory.
Moreover, the custom routing function is not captured under torch compile.
Test Plan
Perform microbenchmark on t

vllm.author: netanel-haber

Purpose
Compile and reorganize image/video preprocessing for nemotron nano VL, reducing the amount of CPU time and memory needed.

Fused resize+normalize+cast under @torch.compile — CPU kernel for permute → bicubic → /255 → (x-mean)/std → dtype.
dtype conversion integrated in the fusion to avoid a l

resolve #39764
When a quantized checkpoint stores already-fused weights (e.g., a single qkv_proj or gate_up_proj), weight_loader_v2 writes the loaded scale into shard 0 only, leaving the remaining slots at their torch.empty indeterminate values. process_weights_after_loading then calls .max(

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Responses API] Fix streaming tool calls on /v1/responses
vllm.author: hnt2601
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two bugs made streaming function calling unusable on the Responses API for any tool-call parser that relies on special-token delimiters (Gemma4), and for any parser when tool_choice="required" is combined with stream=True.

vllm.title: fix: Do not make function calls when request has no tools for /v1/responses
vllm.author: terrytangyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
/v1/responses unconditionally defaults tool_choice to "auto", and construct_tool_dicts only skipped tool setup for None, not for empty lists. So a no-tools request still told the model to make hallucinated function calls when --enable-auto-tool-choice was active.
This PR changed correctly disable to

Purpose
#36963 replaced the Pixtral vision encoder's nn.Linear layers (wq/wk/wv/wo/w1/w2/w3) with QKVParallelLinear and MergedColumnParallelLinear (qkv_proj/o_proj/gate_up_proj/down_proj) to support LoRA. However, the weight loading stacked_params only mapped HF-style names (q_proj, k_proj, etc.), n

vllm.title: [CPU][RISC-V] Support multiple RVV VLEN targets via compile-time dispatch
vllm.author: velonica0
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Add compile-time VLEN dispatch for RISC-V RVV CPU kernels, so vLLM can be built for VLEN=128, VLEN=256, or scalar on any conforming board.
The previous code(#36578) hardcoded zvl128b in -march, which silently produced wrong results or segfaults when rebuilt with a different VLEN (e.g. 256-b
